content: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable replaces deprecated actions-rs/toolchain@v1. Usage: 'uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable' with optional 'targets: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'. actions-rust-lang/setup-rust-toolchain is the other modern choice (adds problem matchers). For cross-rs, install via cargo-binstall or direct cargo install. For setup-cross-toolchain-action (taiki-e), it configures CARGO_BUILD_TARGET and the full cross toolchain in one step without Docker.
